overview.short: Marudeeswarar Temple (மருதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (also called Idayatrunathar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in T.
overview.description: Marudeeswarar Temple (மருதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (also called Idayatrunathar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in T. Edaiyar, a village in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Marudeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Gnanambigai. The temple is located on the Southern banks of Thenpennai River on the Thirukoilur - Thiruvennainallur road.

topPlaces.name: Sirumadurai
topPlaces.description: Sirumadurai is a village located at Thiruvennainallur block of Villupuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is a part of Tirukkoyilur state Assembly Constituency.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvennainallur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvennainallur is a taluk in Viluppuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a major sugarcane agricultural region.

topPlaces.name: Kripapureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kripapureeswarar Temple (கிருபாபுரீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (also called Arutkondanathar or Thiruvennainallur temple) in Thiruvennainallur, a panchayat town in Villupuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanmars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Koovagam
topPlaces.description: Koovagam (கூவாகம்) is a village in the Ulundurpettai taluk in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu. It is located 25 kilometres (16 mi) from Viluppuram and 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Ulundurpet.

topPlaces.name: Sithalingamadam
topPlaces.description: Sithalingamadam is a revenue village in the Thiruvennainallur taluk of Viluppuram district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, and the headquarters of Sithalingamadam revenue block.

topPlaces.name: Veeracholapuram
topPlaces.description: Veeracholapuram is a village located near Kallakurichi in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mambalapattu
topPlaces.description: Mambalapattu is a village in Viluppuram District, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Which is a suburb village of villupuram city.

topPlaces.name: Ayandur
topPlaces.description: Ayandur is an Indian village in kandachipuram Taluk, Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu. Ayandur is close to the towns of Thiruvanamali and Villupram.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (143 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (141 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar?
faq.a: Stays in Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Marundeeswarar Temple, T. Edayar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sirumadurai, Thiruvennainallur, Kripapureeswarar Temple, Koovagam, Sithalingamadam.
